title: Ultimate Spider-Verse
description: A resource pack that lets you turn into lots of Spider-Men, and create your own!
body:
Ultimate Spider-Verse
=====================

 

### Minecraft but its in the Spider-Verse! Includes suits that you can customize, some textures that have been changed to fit the Spider-Verse style, and even custom music!

 

Imagine stepping into the enchanting world of Minecraft, but with a thrilling twist - it's set within the mesmerizing Spider-Verse! Brace yourself for an adventure that transcends dimensions as you swing through the pixelated landscapes, embracing the power and agility of various Spider-Man incarnations.

In this extraordinary Resource Pack, you'll find an array of remarkable suits at your disposal, each representing different iconic versions of the beloved web-slinger. Don the legendary red and blue suit of Peter Parker, the original Spider-Man, and experience the thrill of navigating the blocky cityscape with ease. Or perhaps you prefer the sleek black suit of the symbiote.

But the customization options don't stop there. Dive into the intricacies of this Spider-Verse adaptation and find yourself immersed in a world where you can personalize every aspect of your character's appearance. Tweak your suit designs, modify your mask to reflect your unique style. Whether you prefer a classic, timeless look or wish to forge your own original design, the possibilities are limitless.

**(Optifine/EMF & ETF Required for custom spiders)**

![Suits showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/X9yc5Ohq/images/a69cc3568b99fdfa94c0e1ff15af640dd2effab4.png)

Guide (Apply on leather armor)
------------------------------

*   **Spiderman Suit:** Use Vex armor trim
*   **Miles Morales Suit:** Use Silence armor trim
*   **Miguel O'Hara Suit:** Use Eye armor trim
*   **Gwen Suit:** Use Rib armor trim

 

**(Notice: This Resource pack is in no way affiliated to the Spider-Verse films or Sony)**
